candidates.text: I’m a single 44 year old man who is about to crawl into bed in his 3800sq ft house, with the AC set to 68°F and play Starfox on the Switch 2 until he passes out. Some people, mostly Europeans and online tough guys have a problem with my lifestyle. Below is a space in which you may call me a pussy or a man child or anything else which makes you feel good. I’m here to help. But my life is honestly rad and before too long, I’ll find someone who wants to share it with me.
